enabled.description: Enable or disable the MorphixAI skills plugin

token.description: GitLab personal access token (or use GITLAB_TOKEN env var)

apiKey.description: MorphixAI API Key (mk_xxx format). Or use MORPHIXAI_API_KEY env var

enabled.label: Enable MorphixAI Skills
enabled.description: Master toggle for all MorphixAI workflow skills

pipedream.label: Pipedream Proxy
pipedream.description: Optional: Use Pipedream for unified credential management

enabled.label: Enable Pipedream
enabled.description: Use Pipedream API proxy instead of direct tokens

baibian.label: MorphixAI Link (Third-party Integration)
baibian.description: Link third-party accounts (GitHub, GitLab, Gmail, Outlook, Jira, Slack, etc.) via MorphixAI

enabled.label: Enable MorphixAI
enabled.description: Enable office_link tool for third-party account management and API proxy

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: MorphixAI API Key (mk_xxx). Create at https://baibian.app/api-keys with all scopes
